name: Hillary Clinton
subject: My email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Because I wanted to talk straight to my supporters. | Friend --

I wanted you to hear this directly from me:

Yes, I should have used two email addresses, one for personal matters and one for my work at the State Department. Not doing so was a mistake. I'm sorry about it, and I take full responsibility.

It's important for you to know a few key facts. My use of a personal email account was aboveboard and allowed under the State Department's rules. Everyone I communicated with in government was aware of it. And nothing I ever sent or received was marked classified at the time.

As this process proceeds, I want to be as transparent as possible. That's why I've provided all of my work emails to the government to be released to the public, and why I'll be testifying in public in front of the Benghazi Committee later next month.

I know this is a complex story. I could have -- and should have -- done a better job answering questions earlier. I'm grateful for your support, and I'm not taking anything for granted.

**I understand that you may have more questions, and I am going to work to keep answering them. If you want to read more, including my emails themselves, please go here:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/emails/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM0NTgzNjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwODc2MzAzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

\- September 08 2015 -
Keep Up the Momentum:
Join Us on the Campaign Trail

| Dear Peter Willis, It's going to be a busy few weeks leading up to the debate. We continue to dominate in the polls – [leading with 29% in Iowa and 28% in New Hampshire](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fhritdd-drdiuiutjh-j/). We're going to be making a lot of stops in the next week and we want you to join us. Tomorrow at 1pm, Mr. Trump will be speaking at the Stop the Iran Deal Rally on the West Lawn of the Capitol. Tickets can be reserved [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fhritdd-drdiuiutjh-t/). On Saturday we will be in Ames, Iowa at Iowa State University. On Monday September 14th we will hold our first rally in Texas. **[Tickets are still available](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fhritdd-drdiuiutjh-i/) ****– **but not for long! It's going to be an amazing event just like our rally in Mobile, Alabama.
_Our event in Mobile, Alabama was record breaking_ On Tuesday we will be in Los Angeles aboard the USS Iowa battleship. Veteran's for a Strong America is hosting a 'Make America's Military Great Again' rally. Go [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fhritdd-drdiuiutjh-d/) to arrange tickets. On Wednesday, make sure you tune in to watch the 2nd GOP Presidential Debate. It will begin at 9pm Eastern, 6pm Pacific Time. If you're having a debate watching party, let us know by emailing [events@donaldtrump.com](mailto:events@donaldtrump.com) and #TrumpDebateParty. Don't forget to pick up your debate gear from [our store.](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fhritdd-drdiuiutjh-h/)We hope to see you out on the campaign trail. Together, We Will Make America Great Again.
---

Donald J. Trump

name: Marco Rubio
subject: You’re going to like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

When I started my run for Senate in 2009, I was polling
at 3 percent and the only people who thought I could win were
living in the same house I was - and most of them were under the
age of 10.

We've just released a new, mini-documentary recounting
how we got from there to winning a U.S. Senate seat. That race
may feel like a long time ago, but there are some important
parallels to today's race.

Click here to relive the excitement of the 2010 campaign
and then donate to help make it happen again:
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43817852:19182005161:m:3:1349778030:F8CB9F0A21350B6A942759DB886F7F5E:r

I got into that race, against all odds, because it was an
important fight about what the Republican Party should do for
America, and whether we'd do what's necessary to keep the
American dream alive.

Those same challenges are at issue in this year's
presidential race. Watch the new mini-documentary to learn how we
won and donate $7 to help us share it with more voters.

I believe now as I did then that we can keep the American
dream alive for future generations, but that it is far from a
sure thing.

The right ideas helped us beat the establishment in
Florida; the right ideas can help us retake the White House next
year. If you agree, click here to lend my campaign a hand today
by sharing the new video and donating to our campaign.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

Wow, what a weekend!

On Monday, I had the honor of marching with the United Steelworkers in the Labor Day parade in Bethlehem.

And on Saturday, our campaign was endorsed by over 60 Democratic leaders in Pittsburgh. What a huge boost for our fast-growing campaign. I am so honored to have the support of these dedicated leaders from Allegheny County and beyond. I've worked with many of them for years to rebuild and grow Pennsylvania's middle class, and I'm thrilled to have them on our team as we take on Pat Toomey.

Katie

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: New Iran Video: Whatever it takes
body:
Senator Graham's clear vision of the challenges we face in Iran. Friend,

Senator Graham gave a very important speech yesterday at the National Press Club about the nuclear deal with Iran, and I thought you might want to see what some people have said about it. Senator Graham laid out a clear vision of the challenges we face in Iran, the problems with the Obama administration's disastrous deal, and his vision for U.S. policy in the Middle East under his leadership. Senator Graham's knowledge, experience and preparedness to be Commander-in-Chief was on full display yesterday, and I am confident as more voters see and hear this message that he will prevail in this election.

Thanks,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager

| |

---
---
|
**Graham: "As President, I Will Get Us A Better Deal And Do What It Takes To Make Sure Iran Never Achieves The Ability To Hit Us At Home"**
Senator Lindsey Graham delivered a [speech on the Iran deal](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282618:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r) yesterday as a guest speaker at the National Press Club Luncheon in Washington, DC. Graham outlined the reasons why the deal with Iran is dangerous, how he would negotiate a better deal, and what he would do as president to make sure Iran doesn't achieve the ability to hit our homeland.

Senator Graham has been at the forefront of the fight to stop the Obama Administration's bad nuclear deal with Iran and continues to be the most outspoken critic of the deal when it comes to the 2016 presidential field. In case you missed it, watch the full video of his remarks and check out some of the coverage his speech made below:

[**CLICK TO WATCH THE FULL VIDEO:**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282619:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282619:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r)

**_Jennifer Rubin:_ "It Is An Asset To The Party And The Country To Have A Strong, Informed Voice On National Security..."**
_"Sen. Lindsey O. Graham (R-S.C.) -- in contrast to Donald Trump who seems unabashedly ignorant -- is selling himself as the most experienced presidential candidate on the most important issue, national security. After decades dealing with these issues, more than 35 trips to Iraq and Afghanistan, and experience as a military reservist he probably does deserve that distinction. At the National Press Club on Tuesday, as debate was beginning on the Iran deal, Graham lambasted the president...

"He is a welcome antidote to celebrity politics and an unabashed critic of Donald Trump's brand of nasty politics. Nevertheless, it is an asset to the party and the country to have a strong, informed voice on national security..." _(Jennifer Rubin, "Sen. Lindsey Graham: Selling national security experience," [_The Washington Post_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282620:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/09/15)

**_The Guardian_ : "Lindsey Graham Slammed The Deal As One That 'Gives [Iran] A Nuclear Bomb, A Missile To Deliver It And The Money To Pay For It."**
_"At a luncheon at the National Press Club on Tuesday, long-shot Republican presidential candidate Lindsey Graham slammed the deal as one that 'gives [Iran] a nuclear bomb, a missile to deliver it and the money to pay for it.' The three-term senator from South Carolina and vocal foreign policy hawk argued that Obama had negotiated from a position of weakness and allowed the Iranian regime to take advantage of the United States. 'The Iranians have sized Obama up and found him lacking,' he said."_ (Dan Roberts and Ben Jacobs, "Iran deal: Obama may have support he needs to avoid using veto," [_The Guardian_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282621:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/08/15)

**_TIME_ : "In A Scathing Speech Tuesday, [Graham] Argued That Obama Was Willing To Overlook Festering International Problems [For] The Iranian Agreement."**
_"Sen. Lindsey Graham blamed President Obama's pursuit of an Iranian nuclear deal for everything from Russian's invasion of Ukraine to Chinese cyber-attacks and the collapse of Yemen's government. In a scathing speech Tuesday, the Republican presidential contender argued that Obama was willing to overlook festering international problems in order to get cooperation on the Iranian agreement. 'He has neither the will nor the understanding of the Middle East,' Graham said at an appearance at the National Press Club. 'Evil is doing well on his watch and he has been a poor champion of freedom.'"_ (Philip Elliott, "Graham Blames Global Problems on Iran Nuclear Deal," [_TIME_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282622:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/08/15)

**_LA Times_ : "Graham, An Outspoken Critic Of Obama's Foreign Policy...[Noted] That The United States 'Needed A Tough American President' Who 'Wouldn't Take A Bad [Deal]'"**
_"GOP presidential hopeful Sen. Lindsey Graham (R.-S.C.) labeled the Iran nuclear deal a 'strategic blunder for the ages' that could one day 'become a death sentence for the state of Israel' on Tuesday in Washington. Graham said that President Obama's nuclear deal gives Iran 'a nuclear bomb, a missile to deliver it, and the money to pay for it.' Graham, an outspoken critic of Obama's foreign policy...[Noted] that the United States 'needed a tough American president' who 'wouldn't take a bad [deal],' Graham emphasized that Obama instead 'projected weakness.'"_ (Mary Ann Toman-Miller, "Lindsey Graham calls Iran deal a 'death sentence' for Israel," [_LA Times_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282623:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/08/15)

**_MSNBC_ : "Calling the deal the 'Greatest Miscalculation' Of Obama's Presidency, Graham Said... He'll Fight To Impose Additional Sanctions"**
_"Sen. Lindsey Graham, who is also running for the nation's highest office, delivered remarks criticizing the deal on Tuesday afternoon at the National Press Club in Washington, D.C. Calling the deal the "greatest miscalculation" of Obama's presidency, Graham said no matter how Congress votes, he'll fight to impose additional sanctions against Iran until all U.S. hostages are released. Graham said he will push to block funding for International Atomic Energy Inspections until details of any side agreements are released. 'I will not let up until we change course, force Iran back to the table, and get a better deal,' said the South Carolina lawmaker."_ (Aliyah Frumin, "Dick Cheney: Iran nuclear deal is 'madness,'" [_MSNBC_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282624:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/08/15)

**_CNN_ : "Throughout The Speech, Graham [Talked] About Obama's 'Weakness' And Failures In Negotiating The Deal With Iran"**
_"Republican presidential candidate Sen. Lindsey Graham did not hold back in his criticism of those who run Iran's government Tuesday, calling them Nazis. The South Carolina senator made the comments in speech at the National Press Club in Washington on his opposition to President Barack Obama's nuclear deal with Iran. Graham referred to a 2009 uprising in that was harshly slapped down by the Iranian regime, saying it was Obama's first lesson on how they operate...Throughout the speech, Graham [talked] about Obama's 'weakness' and failures in negotiating the deal with Iran, which is set to come up for debate on the Senate floor Tuesday afternoon."_ (Tal Kopan, "Lindsey Graham: There are 'religious Nazis running Iran,'" [_CNN_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30282625:29022908536:m:1:877327319:0249C891C6B4E269ACB2038EFC76A6F7:r), 09/08/15)

Senator Graham laid out a clear vision of the challenges we face in Iran, the problems with the Obama administration's disastrous deal, and his vision for U.S. policy in the Middle East under his leadership. Senator Graham's knowledge, experience and preparedness to be Commander-in-Chief was on full display yesterday, and I am confident as more voters see and hear this message that he will prevail in this election. Thanks, Christian Ferry Campaign Manager | | | Graham: "As President, I Will Get Us A Better Deal And Do What It Takes To Make Sure Iran Never Achieves The Ability To Hit Us At Home" Senator Lindsey Graham delivered a yesterday as a guest speaker at the National Press Club Luncheon in Washington, DC. Graham outlined the reasons why the deal with Iran is dangerous, how he would negotiate a better deal, and what he would do as president to make sure Iran doesn't achieve the ability to hit our homeland. Senator Graham has been at the forefront of the fight to stop the Obama Administration's bad nuclear deal with Iran and continues to be the most outspoken critic of the deal when it comes to the 2016 presidential field. In case you missed it, watch the full video of his remarks and check out some of the coverage his speech made below: Jennifer Rubin: "It Is An Asset To The Party And The Country To Have A Strong, Informed Voice On National Security..." "Sen. Lindsey O. Graham (R-S.C.) -- in contrast to Donald Trump who seems unabashedly ignorant -- is selling himself as the most experienced presidential candidate on the most important issue, national security. After decades dealing with these issues, more than 35 trips to Iraq and Afghanistan, and experience as a military reservist he probably does deserve that distinction. At the National Press Club on Tuesday, as debate was beginning on the Iran deal, Graham lambasted the president... "He is a welcome antidote to celebrity politics and an unabashed critic of Donald Trump's brand of nasty politics. Nevertheless, it is an asset to the party and the country to have a strong, informed voice on national security..." (Jennifer Rubin, "Sen. Lindsey Graham: Selling national security experience," , 09/09/15) The Guardian : "Lindsey Graham Slammed The Deal As One That 'Gives [Iran] A Nuclear Bomb, A Missile To Deliver It And The Money To Pay For It." "At a luncheon at the National Press Club on Tuesday, long-shot Republican presidential candidate Lindsey Graham slammed the deal as one that 'gives [Iran] a nuclear bomb, a missile to deliver it and the money to pay for it.' The three-term senator from South Carolina and vocal foreign policy hawk argued that Obama had negotiated from a position of weakness and allowed the Iranian regime to take advantage of the United States. 'The Iranians have sized Obama up and found him lacking,' he said." (Dan Roberts and Ben Jacobs, "Iran deal: Obama may have support he needs to avoid using veto," , 09/08/15) TIME : "In A Scathing Speech Tuesday, [Graham] Argued That Obama Was Willing To Overlook Festering International Problems [For] The Iranian Agreement." "Sen. Lindsey Graham blamed President Obama's pursuit of an Iranian nuclear deal for everything from Russian's invasion of Ukraine to Chinese cyber-attacks and the collapse of Yemen's government. In a scathing speech Tuesday, the Republican presidential contender argued that Obama was willing to overlook festering international problems in order to get cooperation on the Iranian agreement. 'He has neither the will nor the understanding of the Middle East,' Graham said at an appearance at the National Press Club. 'Evil is doing well on his watch and he has been a poor champion of freedom.'" (Philip Elliott, "Graham Blames Global Problems on Iran Nuclear Deal," , 09/08/15) LA Times : "Graham, An Outspoken Critic Of Obama's Foreign Policy...[Noted] That The United States 'Needed A Tough American President' Who 'Wouldn't Take A Bad [Deal]'" "GOP presidential hopeful Sen. Lindsey Graham (R.-S.C.) labeled the Iran nuclear deal a 'strategic blunder for the ages' that could one day 'become a death sentence for the state of Israel' on Tuesday in Washington. Graham said that President Obama's nuclear deal gives Iran 'a nuclear bomb, a missile to deliver it, and the money to pay for it.' Graham, an outspoken critic of Obama's foreign policy...[Noted] that the United States 'needed a tough American president' who 'wouldn't take a bad [deal],' Graham emphasized that Obama instead 'projected weakness.'" (Mary Ann Toman-Miller, "Lindsey Graham calls Iran deal a 'death sentence' for Israel," , 09/08/15) MSNBC : "Calling the deal the 'Greatest Miscalculation' Of Obama's Presidency, Graham Said... He'll Fight To Impose Additional Sanctions" "Sen. Lindsey Graham, who is also running for the nation's highest office, delivered remarks criticizing the deal on Tuesday afternoon at the National Press Club in Washington, D.C. Calling the deal the "greatest miscalculation" of Obama's presidency, Graham said no matter how Congress votes, he'll fight to impose additional sanctions against Iran until all U.S. hostages are released. Graham said he will push to block funding for International Atomic Energy Inspections until details of any side agreements are released. 'I will not let up until we change course, force Iran back to the table, and get a better deal,' said the South Carolina lawmaker." (Aliyah Frumin, "Dick Cheney: Iran nuclear deal is 'madness,'" , 09/08/15) CNN : "Throughout The Speech, Graham [Talked] About Obama's 'Weakness' And Failures In Negotiating The Deal With Iran" "Republican presidential candidate Sen. Lindsey Graham did not hold back in his criticism of those who run Iran's government Tuesday, calling them Nazis. The South Carolina senator made the comments in speech at the National Press Club in Washington on his opposition to President Barack Obama's nuclear deal with Iran. Graham referred to a 2009 uprising in that was harshly slapped down by the Iranian regime, saying it was Obama's first lesson on how they operate...Throughout the speech, Graham [talked] about Obama's 'weakness' and failures in negotiating the deal with Iran, which is set to come up for debate on the Senate floor Tuesday afternoon." (Tal Kopan, "Lindsey Graham: There are 'religious Nazis running Iran,'" , 09/08/15) | | Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 14, 2015. name: Rand Paul
subject: Video: contrasts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Elections are about contrasts.

While I am in this race to tear down the big government status quo by blowing up our tax code, the Republican establishment's hand-picked candidate believes in tip-toeing around the mess Barack Obama created.

You can't defeat the Washington Machine by tearing out a couple of pages of our over 70,000 page tax code.

You need to drive a stake through the heart of the IRS.

**[Will you stand with me in the fight to kick the IRS out of your life for good by adding your name to the"Fair and Flat Tax Now!" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30285808:29025834701:m:1:879035888:DB2C7360743D4C8DF21E348C5E7AA113:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, I've proposed the biggest and boldest tax cut in American history.

My 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax puts Washington on a diet and puts over $2 trillion back in Americans' pockets.

The establishment candidate's proposed plan contains a top rate of 28% and cements multiple tax brackets where my plan has only one low rate of 14.5%.

My plan ends corporate welfare by eliminating the giveaways in the tax code the well-connected use to game the system.

His plan allows the Washington Machine's pals to nest their corporate welfare in our tax code.

The Fair and Flat Tax I've proposed eliminates the workers' tax.

It goes to ZERO.

My establishment opponent's plan keeps FICA -- the largest tax many Americans pay -- in place.

Our party can't skirt around the edges of the status quo.

This is our best chance in a generation to deliver true conservative change to America.

The American people are searching for a candidate with bold proposals to take our country back.

Kicking the IRS out of the lives of everyday Americans is step one in defeating the Washington Machine.

My campaign has prepared a special video explaining how my Fair and Flat Tax plan will restore the American dream.

**[I hope you'll take a few moments to watch it and complete your"Fair and Flat Tax Now!" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30285808:29025834701:m:1:879035888:DB2C7360743D4C8DF21E348C5E7AA113:r)**.

After you add your name, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30285808:29025834701:m:1:879035888:DB2C7360743D4C8DF21E348C5E7AA113:r)** so my campaign can get this video in front of as many voters in the key early caucus and primary states as possible.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

body:
| Friend,

I've been in my share of tough fights in Congress, but that doesn't mean I like them.

The government is on the brink of its second shutdown in 2 years. The political games and partisan bickering going on in Washington right now aren't helping anyone.

**I believe you should be able to disagree with someone manufacturing a political crisis.**

My opponent doesn't feel the same way. **His childish name-calling has Rachel Maddow comparing him to Donald Trump and _Politifact_ rating his very first ad as "False."**

_September 30th is the end of another FEC fundraising quarter._ Our numbers are going to be under a microscope. And with less than a year before the primary, every dollar matters.

As the Representative for Florida's 18th Congressional District, I make my decisions based on the facts and what's best for the families that live here.

Florida families don't need another petty politician looking to dominate headlines with schoolyard antics. They need someone who will reach across the aisle and work to deliver results.

**And that 's exactly what I'll do as Senator.**

[**But to get Florida and the Senate back on track, we 've got to hit our $50,000 FEC goal this month -- contribute $5 or more to get us a step closer.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20eb/738133e4/3afd19d3/7f88eb01/2465101045/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150910?refcode=pme150910_a&recurring=true")

Now, just two months after the court's lawless ruling, an elected county clerk was put in jail by an unelected judge for refusing to issue a “marriage" license to a same-sex couple, **removing all doubts about criminalization of Christianity in this country**. name: Our American Revival
subject: Take action on border security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
Hello Peter-

For years, we on the right have been talking about how important it is to secure our southern border and stem the seemingly never-ending tide of illegal immigration, and the smuggling of drugs and guns into our lands.

We are at a tipping point in our nation's history. With more than 13 million illegal immigrants living within our borders we must take the drastic steps those in charge in Washington have decided against taking.

We must secure our border, and we must start now. At Our American Revival, we pride ourselves on getting out the word and helping raise the dialog to a national level, and we need your help in doing so. [**With your donation of $250, $100, $50 or $25, you can help be a part of our brigade to shine the light on this issue and hold the Obama Administration accountable for not enforcing our laws.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM0NjU0NzkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NjQwOTQ3MjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

We must lead from the states and make our voices heard. There are examples of state legislatures that have taken the stand our current federal government will not, and these should be applauded. [**With a contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250 or whatever you can afford, we will be able to highlight the amazing actions taking place in the states to combat this issue.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM0NjU0NzkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NjQwOTQ3MjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Take for example the Texas state senate recently passing a new border security bill. This bill bolsters security on the 1,900 mile Texas/Mexico border by bringing on 250 new state troopers to patrol high crime areas along the border and to help ensure that those attempting to get across the border illegally have less of a shot of making it.

As Americans we stand together in order to do right by our fellow countrymen. Stemming the tide of illegal immigration and securing our border is yet another example of the federal government not living up to its end of the bargain to the American people. Thankfully, states like Texas have taken up the true torch for security and are leading the way. [**And with your contribution of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford today, we will be able to spread the message that more states and citizens need to step up like Texas and secure our country 's future.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM0NjU0NzkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NjQwOTQ3MjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Our American Revival

****
**[P.S. Remember, it is patriots like you that will move our nation in the right direction, if you can spare $50, $100, $250 or more, you will help us get one step closer to ensuring our borders are secure!](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM0NjU0NzkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NjQwOTQ3MjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

[Contribute](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM0NjU0NzkS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NjQwOTQ3MjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Our American Revival

name: Claire & Zack, Bernie 2016
subject: Volunteer events for Bernie near you this week!
body:
#
Dear Bernie Volunteer,
Bernie is telling the billionaire class, "Sorry, you can't have it all." He's telling the big banks, "If you're too big to fail, you're too big to exist." And millions of Americans are jumping up to support his campaign.
Tens of thousands of volunteers are hitting the streets every week for Bernie, leafleting and talking to others in their communities about this movement. These events are fun and easy to participate in -- and there are some very close to you coming up in the days ahead.
**In fact, we're emailing you because there's a Bernie volunteer organizing event happening within about 5 miles of you in the next week.**
[**Find an event near you and sign up to attend now!**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce3a8/1994856291/VEsH/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/")
By signing up new volunteers, these volunteer events are actually building the organization that will soon move on to voter registration and voter contact. We're building an organization in all 50 states that is going to win this election.
Winning this election all starts with you attending or planning something as easy as a flyering event on BernieSanders.com today. Here's the big picture:
1. Right now, we're growing our organization by signing up new volunteers through leafleting, house parties and other fun activities.
2. Next, we'll mobilize that organization to do voter contact work like voter registration, canvassing and phone banking.
3. Closer toward the primary or caucus in your state, we'll start organizing neighborhood teams so that we can get every single Bernie voter to the polls.

Right now our biggest priority is to bring in new volunteers. We do that by spreading the word about Bernie's message, turning on new supporters and making contact with all the supporters already out there. Join us at an event this week!
[**Sign up to attend a volunteer organizing event for Bernie.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce3a8/1994856291/VEsE/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/")
Here are a few snippets reported from organizing events in the past week:
> Santa Rosa, CA: _"I am starting tables at Farmers Markets and then handing them over to leaders who schedule folks and take over. We plan to keep this going until the election. This weekend one leader told me it went really well and that he got about 30 people to sign up to volunteer."_
> Sarasota, FL: _"Each week six or more of us hand out flyers in the Sarasota Farmers Market and ask for email and phone numbers, which we add to our local Bernie database of supporters and volunteers. We'll be expanding next week to the Siesta Key market and in October to the Venice, Bradenton, and Englewood markets as well as to other events where there are large crowds. We have over 400 people already in our database."_
> Raleigh, NC: _"We read the online event toolkit for organizing and for flyering. We each gave out over 1,000 flyers at First Friday Art Walk. We also gave out Bernie buttons. A few people signed up to volunteer and signed up for the email list. People were enthusiastic to see us out there. My friend Sarah said, 'For the people; not the corporations' when she handed out her flyers. I just said, 'Information about Bernie Sanders.'"_
> Santa Barbara, CA: _"I did flyering and chalking with one other woman at another location outside a farmers market and we got 16 new sign ups and generally great receptivity. There were a couple people who had heard of Bernie but were leaning Hillary, and we encouraged them to go study up and they sounded really open to it."_
[**Make your own volunteering story. Find an event near you and sign up to volunteer for Bernie in your community.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce3a8/1994856291/VEsF/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/")
It's an honor working alongside you in this movement!
Claire Sandberg & Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce3a9/1994856291/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce356/1994856291/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce357/1994856291/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220c/43f17890/5baf853e/621ce354/1994856291/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
